title: Label-free Microfluidic-based Isolation of Circulating Tumour Cells from GI Cancer
summary: Research presentation on label-free microfluidic isolation of circulating tumour cells from gastrointestinal cancer patients, covering device design and clinical application.

title: Is Eureka Outdated?
